channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A federal judge temporarily paused Paramount’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros.
item.content:encoded: A federal judge temporarily paused Paramount’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros.

item.title: A judge orders a temporary halt to the Paramount-WBD merger,…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A judge orders a temporary halt to the Paramount-WBD merger, as a 12-state coalition, led by California, argues it would violate federal antitrust law (Gene Maddaus/Variety)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A judge orders a temporary halt to the Paramount-WBD merger, as a 12-state coalition, led by California, argues it would violate federal antitrust law (Gene Maddaus/Variety)

item.content:encoded: BREAKING: Judge temporarily pauses Paramount Skydance's takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery after 12 states sue to block the merger.

item.title: Unabating protests across Ukraine have forced President Volo…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Unabating protests across Ukraine have forced President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to choose between two men standing 26 years apart.
item.content:encoded: Unabating protests across Ukraine have forced President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to choose between two men standing 26 years apart.

item.title: Singles are outsourcing dating-app chats to AI tools like Ch…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Singles are outsourcing dating-app chats to AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin.
item.content:encoded: Singles are outsourcing dating-app chats to AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 「ドコモの銀行」で何が変わる？ ポイント最大4.5％還元、金融経済圏のメリットと課題 (1/4) …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
「ドコモの銀行」で何が変わる？　ポイント最大4.5％還元、金融経済圏のメリットと課題 (1/4)

7月1日、NTTドコモ傘下の金融関連会社をまとめた「NTTドコモ・フィナンシャルグループ」が誕生した。 8月3日には住信SBIネット銀行が「ドコモSMTBネット銀行」に社名が変更となり、「ドコモの銀行」というブランドを冠することになる。 SNS上では「ドコモの銀行、ダサすぎる。SBI新生銀行に乗り換える」といった不満の声...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
「ドコモの銀行」で何が変わる？　ポイント最大4.5％還元、金融経済圏のメリットと課題 (1/4)

7月1日、NTTドコモ傘下の金融関連会社をまとめた「NTTドコモ・フィナンシャルグループ」が誕生した。 8月3日には住信SBIネット銀行が「ドコモSMTBネット銀行」に社名が変更となり、「ドコモの銀行」というブランドを冠することになる。 SNS上では「ドコモの銀行、ダサすぎる。SBI新生銀行に乗り換える」といった不満の声...

item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)

item.content:encoded: Welcome to the age of extreme job anxiety | Zoe Williams

item.title: Ultimately, we discovered that even if someone handed us the…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Ultimately, we discovered that even if someone handed us the worst ice cream sandwich, we’d probably still eat it. But here’s the ice cream we’d scream for the loudest. nyti.ms/4wacR5G
item.content:encoded: Ultimately, we discovered that even if someone handed us the worst ice cream sandwich, we’d probably still eat it. But here’s the ice cream we’d scream for the loudest. nyti.ms/4wacR5G

item.title: Thousands of protesters gathered in New Delhi to march to Pa…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Thousands of protesters gathered in New Delhi to march to Parliament on Monday, demanding the resignation of India’s education minister after botched college entrance exams disrupted the lives of millions of students. nyti.ms/3RKR9pO
item.content:encoded: Thousands of protesters gathered in New Delhi to march to Parliament on Monday, demanding the resignation of India’s education minister after botched college entrance exams disrupted the lives of millions of students. nyti.ms/3RKR9pO

item.title: Hundreds are expected to attend the funeral service for Nola…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Hundreds are expected to attend the funeral service for Nolan Wells, the teenage football star whose body was found on the shores of Mississippi’s Horn Island days after he went missing.
item.content:encoded: Hundreds are expected to attend the funeral service for Nolan Wells, the teenage football star whose body was found on the shores of Mississippi’s Horn Island days after he went missing.

item.title: If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text 988 to…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text 988 to reach the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline or chat live at 988lifeline.org.
item.content:encoded: If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text 988 to reach the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline or chat live at 988lifeline.org.

item.content:encoded: The latest poll of the Florida governor race showed Donalds with a single-digit lead over Democrat David Jolly.

item.description:

item.title: Andy Burnham officially became Britain’s seventh prime minis…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Andy Burnham officially became Britain’s seventh prime minister in the last decade on Monday after being formally invited to form a government by King Charles. nyti.ms/4pzc0Jh
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham officially became Britain’s seventh prime minister in the last decade on Monday after being formally invited to form a government by King Charles. nyti.ms/4pzc0Jh

item.title: Unsealed docs: the DOJ sought phone records of NYT reporters…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: One morning, a mother woke up to find her daughter, who was …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: One morning, a mother woke up to find her daughter, who was trans, dead. Her life and death provide a glimpse into the tremendous and tragic effect that anti-trans laws and political rhetoric have had on trans people across America.
item.content:encoded: One morning, a mother woke up to find her daughter, who was trans, dead. Her life and death provide a glimpse into the tremendous and tragic effect that anti-trans laws and political rhetoric have had on trans people across America.

item.content:encoded: For fans at MetLife Stadium, the World Cup final was the thrill of a lifetime. See photos from inside the game here.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [15話]続テルマエ・ロマエ - ヤマザキマリ | 少年ジャンプ＋ 続テルマエ・ロマエ ヤマザキ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[15話]続テルマエ・ロマエ - ヤマザキマリ | 少年ジャンプ＋

続テルマエ・ロマエ ヤマザキマリ <月一火曜更新>紀元158年、ローマ帝国はアントニヌス・ピウスの統治下20年目。ローマの浴場設計士ルシウスは還暦を迎えて腰痛持ち、妻のさつきは謎の失踪、息子マリウスは理解不能…。さらに彼を悩ませるのはローマの風呂の仕事であったが!? [JC2巻発売中]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[15話]続テルマエ・ロマエ - ヤマザキマリ | 少年ジャンプ＋

続テルマエ・ロマエ ヤマザキマリ <月一火曜更新>紀元158年、ローマ帝国はアントニヌス・ピウスの統治下20年目。ローマの浴場設計士ルシウスは還暦を迎えて腰痛持ち、妻のさつきは謎の失踪、息子マリウスは理解不能…。さらに彼を悩ませるのはローマの風呂の仕事であったが!? [JC2巻発売中]

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “The appropriate yardstick of a…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“The appropriate yardstick of a new policy is not whether it solves every problem but whether it represents progress, and the pied-à-terre tax does,” writes the editorial board on the recent debate over a tax on high-priced second homes in New York City.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“The appropriate yardstick of a new policy is not whether it solves every problem but whether it represents progress, and the pied-à-terre tax does,” writes the editorial board on the recent debate over a tax on high-priced second homes in New York City.

item.title: 🎧️ LISTEN: Can China beat the US for AI dominance? And can …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
🎧️ LISTEN: Can China beat the US for AI dominance? And can models like the Moonshot's Kimi help close the gap?

Our reporters discuss here ⤵️
item.content:encoded:
🎧️ LISTEN: Can China beat the US for AI dominance? And can models like the Moonshot's Kimi help close the gap?

Our reporters discuss here ⤵️

item.title: Beef prices are at record highs, but Burger King isn't backi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Beef prices are at record highs, but Burger King isn't backing away from burgers. In an interview with NBC News for the Business in America series, Burger King U.S. and Canada President Tom Curtis says the chain plans to focus on value and growing customer traffic rather than relying on price hikes.
item.content:encoded: Beef prices are at record highs, but Burger King isn't backing away from burgers. In an interview with NBC News for the Business in America series, Burger King U.S. and Canada President Tom Curtis says the chain plans to focus on value and growing customer traffic rather than relying on price hikes.

item.title: People are spending more time on Google than ever since A.I.…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: People are spending more time on Google than ever since A.I. Mode was introduced last year, which replaces search results of hyperlinks with responses written by Gemini. The changes threaten the open web and show how rapidly A.I. has upended the technology landscape.
item.content:encoded: People are spending more time on Google than ever since A.I. Mode was introduced last year, which replaces search results of hyperlinks with responses written by Gemini. The changes threaten the open web and show how rapidly A.I. has upended the technology landscape.

item.title: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan has died at …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan has died at the age of 75, his former club ​Newcastle United said. https://cnn.it/4yOpRjh
item.content:encoded: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan has died at the age of 75, his former club ​Newcastle United said. https://cnn.it/4yOpRjh

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: #🔖世の中 中国海警局が「木製の棒で殴打」 南シナ海で比軍兵士負傷 【7月20日 AFP】フィリピン軍は20日、同国…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
中国海警局が「木製の棒で殴打」 南シナ海で比軍兵士負傷

【7月20日 AFP】フィリピン軍は20日、同国が拠点とする南シナ海の座礁船周辺で、近づいてきた中国海警局船の乗組員により、兵士が木製の棒で殴打され、負傷したことを明らかにした。この発表のわずか数時間前には、両国の外相が今週マニラで会談することが発表されたばかりだった。 フィリピン側の説明によると、8人が乗...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
中国海警局が「木製の棒で殴打」 南シナ海で比軍兵士負傷

【7月20日 AFP】フィリピン軍は20日、同国が拠点とする南シナ海の座礁船周辺で、近づいてきた中国海警局船の乗組員により、兵士が木製の棒で殴打され、負傷したことを明らかにした。この発表のわずか数時間前には、両国の外相が今週マニラで会談することが発表されたばかりだった。 フィリピン側の説明によると、8人が乗...

item.title: #🔖世の中 「県民は怒っているんですよ」福岡県議会の金銭授受疑惑、県の式典で予定外の苦言 住民代表「恥ずかしくてしょう…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「県民は怒っているんですよ」福岡県議会の金銭授受疑惑、県の式典で予定外の苦言　住民代表「恥ずかしくてしょうがない」…静まり返る県議や知事（西日本新聞me） - Yahoo!ニュース

「一日も早く真偽を確かめてほしい」。19日、福岡県議や服部誠太郎知事らが出席して福岡市内で開かれた式典で、地域住民代表として招かれていた男性が、県議会の議長・副議長ポストを巡る金銭授受疑惑に関して苦言を呈する一幕があった。 【関連】「ばかにしているのか」副議長会見に県民から怒りの声 式典は、同市中央...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「県民は怒っているんですよ」福岡県議会の金銭授受疑惑、県の式典で予定外の苦言　住民代表「恥ずかしくてしょうがない」…静まり返る県議や知事（西日本新聞me） - Yahoo!ニュース

「一日も早く真偽を確かめてほしい」。19日、福岡県議や服部誠太郎知事らが出席して福岡市内で開かれた式典で、地域住民代表として招かれていた男性が、県議会の議長・副議長ポストを巡る金銭授受疑惑に関して苦言を呈する一幕があった。 【関連】「ばかにしているのか」副議長会見に県民から怒りの声 式典は、同市中央...

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Scholar Rock says EU opinion on SMA drug may be pushed to la…

item.content:encoded: Scholar Rock says EU opinion on SMA drug may be pushed to later in 2026 reut.rs/4pqO7U0

item.title: The historic 48-team World Cup ended on Sunday with Spain de…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The historic 48-team World Cup ended on Sunday with Spain defeating Argentina in the biggest, most lucrative tournament on record. Yet its ultimate legacy may be defined by a political scandal that shattered FIFA’s claim to neutrality.
item.content:encoded: The historic 48-team World Cup ended on Sunday with Spain defeating Argentina in the biggest, most lucrative tournament on record. Yet its ultimate legacy may be defined by a political scandal that shattered FIFA’s claim to neutrality.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第95話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 限界OL霧切ギリ子 ミー…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第95話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋

限界OL霧切ギリ子 ミートスパ土本 <毎週火曜更新！最新3話無料>限界生まれ限界育ち、癖の強い奴はだいたい知り合い…。霧切ギリ子が贈る、今日をなんとか生きるライフハック――!?読めば新たな知見を得る限界群像劇。 [JC3巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第95話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋

限界OL霧切ギリ子 ミートスパ土本 <毎週火曜更新！最新3話無料>限界生まれ限界育ち、癖の強い奴はだいたい知り合い…。霧切ギリ子が贈る、今日をなんとか生きるライフハック――!?読めば新たな知見を得る限界群像劇。 [JC3巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: Here's why oil prices haven’t gone crazy, yet, despite five …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Here's why oil prices haven’t gone crazy, yet, despite five months of the US-Iran war reut.rs/4gJzucl
item.content:encoded: Here's why oil prices haven’t gone crazy, yet, despite five months of the US-Iran war reut.rs/4gJzucl
